# Sikhism: Vaak Explainer Source Pack

## Purpose

This file provides reference material for the Sikhism: Vaak Explainer skill.

The AI should use this information to improve source attribution, context retrieval, and explanation quality.

## Trusted Source Hierarchy

### Tier 1 - Primary Source Verification

- Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji
- Exact Gurmukhi text verification
- Verified Ang, Raag, Mahala, Bhagat, Bhatt, or contributor information

### Tier 2 - Sikh Educational Sources

- SikhRI (https://sikhri.org)
- Guru Granth Sahib Project (https://project.gurugranthsahib.io)
- SGPC resources (https://sgpc.net)

### Tier 3 - Academic Context

Use only as supporting context:

- J.S. Grewal
- Pashaura Singh
- Nikky-Guninder Kaur Singh
- Harjot Oberoi

## Attribution Rules

Never assume a source.

Check:

1. Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji
2. Bhai Gurdas Vaaran
3. Bhai Nand Lal Ji
4. Dasam Granth
5. Rehatnama literature
6. Janamsakhi literature
7. Sikh devotional tradition

If uncertain, clearly state uncertainty.

## Interpretation Principles

- Read Punjabi or Gurmukhi first.
- Do not rely on English text in images.
- Retrieve the full shabad whenever possible.
- Explain the full composition before focusing on one line.
- Identify Rahao when present.
- Keep explanations concise and mobile-friendly.

## Mobile-Friendly Response Structure

1. Gurbani Line
2. Core Meaning
3. Full Shabad Context
4. Key Words
5. Historical and Spiritual Context
6. Application to Life
7. Source Note
